lines.text: Me (Me, me, me) / Can you focus on me? (Me, me) / Baby, can you focus on me? (Focus on me) / Babe
Hands in the soap (Soap) / Have the faucet's running / And I keep looking at you (Looking at you, looking at you) / Stuck on your phone / And you're stuck in your zone / You don't have a clue
But I don't wanna give up (Give up, give up) / Baby, I just want you to get up (Get up, get up) / Lately, I've been a little fed up (Fed up, fed up) / Wish you would just focus on
Lazy and broke? (Broke) / No, he get this money / So I guess I can't complain / But I feel alone even when we're alone / And that don't cost a thing
Baby, focus / Can't you see? / I just wanna love you, baby / Look me in my eyes
